name: Tina Smith
subject: I'm busy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're falling behind on our final grassroots goal for the year. It's a terrible time to be in this position, but you can help.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-busy?refcode=em191229-busy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I'm doing everything I can to stick up for folks like you and fight for our values in the Senate -- like making sure everyone has the health care they need and creating a government that works for all of us.

Since I'm busy working hard for Minnesota, here's where I could really use your help.

We're falling behind on our final grassroots goal for the year. It's a pretty terrible time to be in this position. Folks aren't checking their emails as often because they're spending time with loved ones, enjoying their holiday break, or traveling -- and heck, I don't blame them! But it means our fundraising has slowed down significantly.

A donation of whatever amount you're able to spare before our critical end-of-year deadline in 48 hours should do the trick. So, I'm asking:

**Will you add a contribution to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before this all-important deadline? I need your support to put our team back on track and focus on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Donate now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-busy?refcode=em191229-busy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-busy?refcode=em191229-busy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you.

-- Tina

name: Cory Booker
subject: This is bigger than just one guy in one office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We have a chance to show courageous empathy in this election.
| | |
---
| Friend, We're so close to turning the page to a critical, defining year for our country. This election isn't a referendum on just one guy in one office -- it's so much bigger than that. This is about who we are as a country and who we want to be. Will we be leaders in the fight against climate change, or continue to deny its existence and deregulate the fossil fuel industry? Will we declare that health care is a human right, or keep denying people access to the care they need to survive? Will we live up to our ideals as a country and welcome refugees and asylum seekers, or strip away their dignity and hold them in cages at our border? This is what's on the ballot in 2020, friend. We have a chance to show courageous empathy in this election -- if we choose to show up for each other. _**[If you're with me in this fight, I need your help to hit our $800,000 fundraising goal -- make a donation to my campaign before the end of the year.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191229_CB_20191229-fr-CB-aroundcorner-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Thanks, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191229_CB_20191229-fr-CB-aroundcorner-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb37/1193182574/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb36/1193182574/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb35/1193182574/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb34/1193182574/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb33/1193182574/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f78/5fca0d19/7bff3514/291ccb37/1193182574/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Yang
subject: Here’s the situation:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’ve done what no one thought we could do. And now, as 2020 starts, everyone is expecting Andrew to stop qualifying for debates and slowly fizzle out.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5) **🧢Two Days Left🧢

GOAL: $3,000,000
Total Raised: $1,945,065

[Donate the current average donation of $29 right now to help us reach our goal.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=5&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)** | [Donate $29](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=8&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
Yang Gang --

**Here’s the situation:** We’ve done what no one thought we could do. And now, as 2020 starts, everyone is expecting Andrew to stop qualifying for debates and slowly fizzle out.

**Our plan:** Invest in TV, digital, and on-the-ground voter outreach in key states and rise in the polls.

**How we do it:** We need to raise $1,054,935 in the next two days to fund the teams and programs that will talk with voters ahead of the debate qualification deadline in two weeks.

[Donate now toward our goal so we can take our message directly to voters. If you want to see a universal basic income for every American, corporations forced to pay their fair share, and real action on climate change -- we need you to pitch in now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=9&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=14&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=15&amount=25&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---
We’re taking on the establishment, a media that ignores us, and candidates with lists of big money donors.

But we know we can win this fight and take our movement all the way to the White House because we have YOU.

[Let’s show everyone watching we can crush this goal, Yang Gang. Make a contribution of $29 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=6&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)

Thank you, Yang Gang.

Team Yang
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Donate](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20805?t=7&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5346%2E377263%2EP6b_C5) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Team Braun
subject: Travesty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | Peter, What’s happening in Washington today is ridiculous. **It is ridiculous that the Democrats have abused the impeachment process for political gain.** It is ridiculous that we have delayed critically items like the USMCA to play political games. It is ridiculous that one political party refuses to accept the results of the 2016 election. **If you think it’s time for Congress to stop with the sham impeachment and to start doing its damn job, I hope you can help our campaign today.** [**Please join our team by making a donation of $20.20 today so we have the resources needed to defend President Trump and help Republicans win up and down the ballot next year.**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljfhl-kujulhlke-y/) This is going to be the most consequential election in our lifetimes. And the differences between the parties could not be clearer. President Trump and the Republicans in Washington have created the strongest economy our nation has ever seen. Unemployment is at record lows and the stock market has never been higher. We have begun construction of the wall and secured our border, protecting millions of Americans in the process. **But the Democrats want to dump Trump so they can pass their socialist agenda.** They want to raise taxes on the Middle Class so they can ram through single payer healthcare, free college for rich kids, and the Green New Deal. Those policies will destroy the economy and the progress we’ve made. [**Help me fight back and stand with President Trump by making a donation of $20.20 today.**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljfhl-kujulhlke-j/) With so much at risk, your help is needed now more than ever. Thanks. Team Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljfhl-kujulhlke-t/) |
---|---|---

[mikebraunforindiana.com](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljfhl-kujulhlke-i/)

but you may [unsubscribe](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jhljfhl-kujulhlke-r/) if you're no longer interested.

Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Get Nancy Mace's Book Signed TODAY! 📖📖📖
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-i/)
| | | Dear Friend, _**[We Are Fast Approaching Our End Of Quarter FEC Deadline, And We Urgently Need Your Help.](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-d/)**_ I _personally_ want to ensure you receive this offer this holiday season... As many of you know or have heard my story, I struggled growing up. Some of the obstacles I faced I made for myself, others were made for me. I made a few decisions that would change my life forever, some for better and some for worse. After I dropped out of high school, I eventually would go on to follow in my father's footsteps at his alma mater. This decision changed my life, but it also saved my life. And so, several years ago I penned a memoir about my experience at The Citadel called, "In the Company of Men: A Woman at The Citadel.” I learned a lot about courage. Courage to speak up for myself and to speak up for others. I learned about having confidence; confidence to start my own business; confidence to work for some top tier institutions in the country; confidence to be the mom I am today; confidence to run for office. Now, I’m entering the arena and I’m bringing my experience to the campaign trail to defeat Joe Cunningham in South Carolina’s First Congressional District. So as our team takes on this challenge, I want to share a special offer with you... _If you contribute $50 or more between NOW and TUESDAY, to fuel my campaign for Congress, you will receive a signed copy of my book, "In the Company of Men: A Woman at The Citadel.”_ [_**< << GET NANCY'S BOOK NOW >>>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-h/)
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-k/)
[_**< << GET NANCY'S BOOK NOW >>>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-u/) We can’t do this without you, and I hope you’ll consider contributing today to help me defeat my opponent and to share a story that overcame obstacles and adversity by having the courage to work hard and the confidence to never back down, to never quit. By donating today and by sharing this story, you can help spread the word about this pivotal election. I cannot thank you enough. [_**< << GET NANCY'S BOOK NOW >>> **_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-o/) Sincerely, Nancy Mace [_PS — If you'd like to contribute — any amount — you can contribute here_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-b/). And to get a signed copy of my book, click below. Again, thank you! [_**GET A SIGNED COPY TODAY >>>**_
_**GET A SIGNED COPY TODAY >>>**_
_**GET A SIGNED COPY TODAY >>>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhltjrhl-uuffjdtr-n/)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: One heck of a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's a whole lot on the line next year. But our path to take back the Senate gets way too rocky if we don't defend Tina Smith.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

Donald Trump barely lost Minnesota in 2016 -- in fact, he was just 1.5 percentage points from flipping it.

This time around, he'll be dumping truckloads of money into Minnesota to try to swing this election in his favor -- and to get another lapdog in the Senate by replacing my friend and colleague Tina Smith with Republican Jason Lewis.

We can't let that happen. We need Tina in the Senate to fight back against health insurance companies, to help students getting crushed by debt, and to hold Wall Street accountable for hurting working people.

I'll just be blunt: this will be one heck of a tough fight. Republicans have a network of dark money groups and super PACs at their every beck and call, and we know they like to play big-money politics because they're afraid of the grassroots energy we bring to the fight.

And you know what? They should be.

We've shown time and again that when a groundswell of grassroots support comes through, we can take on the special interests and win. So, when people like you and I fight alongside leaders like Tina, that's the most powerful political force in the country.

**Pitch in $10 or whatever you can today to fight for Tina before her most important end-of-quarter deadline of the year. Every dollar makes a difference in our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and send Donald Trump packing next year.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191229-warren?refcode=em191229-warren&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
There's a whole lot on the line next year -- from winning back the White House to flipping the Senate. But our path to take back the Senate gets way too rocky if we don't defend Tina.

That's why I'm asking you to chip in and help stop Donald Trump and Jason Lewis in Minnesota. Together, we can win this fight, but it's going to take all we have to do it.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: America needs NC's best on the ballot in Nov. Here's why that's me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2020 Campaign Committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/D1fkfA6wpyUVvupp7aRAF08KWX0LjF-Ly0Q2nOrirjM=)

Dear friend:
Here in battleground North Carolina, we face a defining moment just weeks from now. Its outcome will help determine the answers to the two most pressing political questions of our time:
**(1) Which party will control the U.S. Senate in 2021? **
**(2) Which party will win the White House? **
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance. **That's why I'm urgently requesting **[your financial support](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/wNsdRoI-E8ESBlPY0LcQbQlS8D0pxjfB5_n37xd7W_8=)** for my U.S. Senate campaign _before New Years Day_.
The March 3rd primary to select the Democrat who can unseat U.S. Sen. Thom Tillis is pivotal not only because Tillis is vulnerable, but also because NC might swing either way in the **presidential** election. Our state can tip the balance in 2020 - **but _only_ if we choose the candidate who can drive turnout.**
**That candidate is me. **In every poll so far ([Emerson](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/LZd4jLKm0U5aWEXMrnvx1eMHjqOmcEnCIOJ-fUaAOKg=), [Meredith](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/oUVDIrzlBPOzsw9AcKGsBNQlblq5pKzkoKWS6W7IU0Y=), and [Fox](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/QhywCkunP2cY4L0vXePoQC-emF_KwQqgafFkVRa3M1w=)) I'm the frontrunner, against both my primary opponent _and_ against Tillis in November.
**There 's just one catch.** I'm not just facing a primary opponent. I'm also facing Chuck Schumer, whose Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee ignored the people's voice with its unwise endorsement of my **much less qualified** opponent. So why am I leading despite my opponent's flood of Schumer cash?
**Because I 'm the candidate who energizes voters of _all_ colors.** I'm a woman of color who has succeeded by working shoulder to shoulder with people of every color.
**I 'm the candidate who bridges the urban/rural divide.** I grew up working our family's farm, and have earned my living in major cities like Seattle and Raleigh. I'm a State Senator representing a rural and diverse district, where I champion rural economic development.
**I 'm the candidate who addresses young voters' concerns. **I don't just believe in science, I've _lived_ it, as an engineer at Boeing. I've _fought_ for equality by sponsoring bills to extend hate crimes to include those targeting gender identity and sexual orientation, to repeal our state's notorious 'bathroom bill,' for a $15 minimum wage, for equal pay for equal work, and more.
**I 'm the candidate who motivates people of faith to vote Democratic again. **I'm an ordained clergywoman and church leader.
**I 'm the candidate who inspires women. **With effort, guts, and brains I've worked my way up from picking cucumbers to an engineering career, and to my seat in the State Senate, while raising four children.
**I 'm the candidate who _knows_ how to win elections. **I've won every one I've ever run in, from school board to three state senate terms. My primary opponent has won only one (twenty years ago), but when the going got tough he passed on a reelection bid. Then he lost his 2010 primary bid for the U.S. Senate.
**But it 's crunch time, and I need your financial support by December 31st. **I ask for it not only for my campaign, but also for all of NC's Democratic voters, who yearn for a real _choice_ on March 3rd. I need your financial support **_now_** to reach those Democrats who don't yet know about the choice I offer them, to drive them to the polls in March - and again in November.
Let's let the voters, not Chuck Schumer, decide whom NC Democrats' champion should be in November. Please donate generously **[by clicking here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/wNsdRoI-E8ESBlPY0LcQbQlS8D0pxjfB5_n37xd7W_8=)** , and please do it **now **(or, at least, _before January 1_). As little as $20 will help; as much more that you can spare will help even more.

Thank you!
NC State Senator Erica D. Smith
[EricaForUS.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/c_xkgoNzuaxaXw9viqbEyTeXeqKpg9DiQw9X-ckVf0U=)

Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2020 Campaign Committee
---
Erica For US
PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q0YRE4afMx7EZz7OtOtnzraZ1-9UkB3f2orTABpVt64=/Ouss4-8grucMtjvbAk_ToafumKFteJIjxyWv4-EvTuI=).

name: Dean Browning
subject: Time is running out! ⏰
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope everyone is looking forward to the coming new year and enjoying the holiday time with family and friends.
As 2019 comes to an end, we are quickly approaching the FEC fundraising deadline of December 31st. Please consider donating $100, $250 or $500 to help us reach our fundraising goal for the end of the year!
It is important for us to finish the year strong and we are still $12,236 short of our goal.
Please contribute what you can to our campaign today. Every donation will help us reach our goal so we can win this coming November!

name: Eugene (personal)
subject: My mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I was so touched to read my mom’s email yesterday. I’m so grateful to her for always teaching me the values of hard work and to always stand up for what I believe in.
Team,

I was so touched to read my mom’s email (below) yesterday. **I’m so grateful to her for always teaching me the values of hard work and to always stand up for what I believe in.**

I’m in this race because I believe that the people of South Central PA deserve a representative who puts their interests first, and right now we don’t have that.

In order for our campaign to remain competitive, we have to make sure we’re hitting our goals before these all-important FEC fundraising deadlines.

As of right now we’re still $1,855 behind. Please consider helping us close the gap by contributing before midnight tomorrow:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq42019/december](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13401342/139092386/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_ep_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmM5MzY3MS0yODJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBPzhjJNyss23yw62PdIHpLF7RHQ4KsSpnDtNjcWrs8=)**

Thank you for being by my side,
Eugene

\-----forwarded message-----
From: **Josie DePasquale**
Date: December 29, 2019, 6:09 PM
Subject: my son [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13401343/139092387/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_ep_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmM5MzY3MS0yODJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBPzhjJNyss23yw62PdIHpLF7RHQ4KsSpnDtNjcWrs8=) Team,

The last time I wrote to you, my son, Eugene, was facing his first FEC fundraising deadline. I was happy to play a small role in helping him meet that crucial goal. Sometimes, I still can’t believe my son is running for Congress, but I want him to know that I always have his back.

I can’t tell you how proud I am of the person Eugene has become. He is kind, generous, and an amazing example to his children. Seeing him as a father to Ben and Sarah fills my heart with joy.

But he is also a fighter, and as Pennsylvania's Auditor General, I have seen him continuously fight for the people of our communities. **I know that he will make us proud in Congress.**

[**I’m not a politician, and I don’t like asking you to part ways with your hard-earned money, but this campaign is extremely competitive and too important to sit on the sidelines. Would you consider donating to Eugene’s campaign, so he can start off the New Year on the right foot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13401344/139092388/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_ep_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmM5MzY3MS0yODJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBPzhjJNyss23yw62PdIHpLF7RHQ4KsSpnDtNjcWrs8=)

I believe in Eugene and I know that if everyone gets involved, even in a small way, he can win this. Thank you for supporting my son, and Happy New Year!

\--_Josie DePasquale_

name: Tim Walz
subject: This is our last chance
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, As I reflect on the past year, I have so much to be thankful for. Not the least of which is this One Minnesota team. From day one, our campaign has been grounded in the idea that we can do more to improve the lives of Minnesotans if we rise above the politics of fear and division and focus instead on our strength in unity. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
As I reflect on the past year, I have so much to be thankful for. Not the least of which is this One Minnesota team.
From day one, our campaign has been grounded in the idea that we can do more to improve the lives of Minnesotans if we rise above the politics of fear and division and focus instead on our strength in unity.
I'm proud of what we've accomplished so far, but our movement is about to face one of its biggest tests yet.
Shortly after the new year, our 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time, and right now, we're still trailing behind our budget targets.
**Our end-of-year deadline is midnight tomorrow and my team tells me we 're still more than $5,100 short. [Will you make a contribution of $5 or more today to help us make up the difference before we run out of time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
********[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-2018)********
********[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?refcode=_other-2018)********
President Trump has made no secret that he's going to do everything he can to flip Minnesota red next year, jeopardizing every single race up and down the ballot.
Our campaign is working hard to hold the line and support our One Minnesota allies across the state, but we can't keep it up without you.
Tomorrow's deadline is our last chance to make sure we have the resources to hit the ground running next year, and our first chance in 2020 to prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever.
[**Please, make a contribution that works for you today to help us finish 2019 strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?refcode=body&amount=25)
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz
| ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/13nC5VPMkHDAtjRtCdK6qd3t_7pW-W2LXEtREoyI27o=/AtlwrMdm4qmBGUFjwFIuOy5JiSBRrKxQUKdbqoehBQk=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A good chunk behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Nobody gets this done on their own. It's about the values we share, and the fights we take on together. We won before because we built a grassroots movement, and that's how we'll win again... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfa8/45c30650/1155233ec/66fd7fa3/2163251627/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street.

Massachusetts had never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate before -- and a lot of people thought we still weren't ready to elect one in 2012. They wished me luck but said we didn't stand a chance.

But then we won -- _by 7.5 points_.

I'm no stranger to tough fights. I know how to fight, and more importantly, I know how to win -- and right now, winning this is going to take resources.

**Together, we've raised over $17 million for the quarter -- but that means we're a good chunk behind where we were at this point last quarter. If we don't pick up the pace right now, we won't be in the strongest possible position heading into 2020.**

**[We've set a goal of raising $20 million before midnight tomorrow-- and I'm reaching out today because I need the help of some of our strongest supporters to get there. Will you chip in what you can right now to help meet this critical goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfa8/45c30650/1155233ec/66fd7fa2/2163251627/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFQRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAxOTEyMzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1PF_EOQ_BIO_E_20191230_V1S1_P")**

>
Nobody gets this done on their own. It's about the values we share, and the fights we take on _together_. We won before because we built a grassroots movement, and that's how we'll win again.

We have a plan to organize in all 50 states -- and build grassroots momentum in communities all over the country. We're taking our message to voters far and wide and giving people a reason to show up and vote. And we can't do it without you.

**We're not done fighting yet -- but we don't have a lot of time left to get this done.** **[Please contribute $2, or whatever you can, to help reach our $20 million goal before tomorrow night's FEC deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfa8/45c30650/1155233ec/66fd7fa2/2163251627/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFQRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAxOTEyMzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1PF_EOQ_BIO_E_20191230_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

I know you might be spending time with family or on vacation but we need your help to have the strongest quarter possible. = = This is where the rubber meets the road. We are just 64 days until election day — 64 days! We have been on the campaign trail for a long time. We kicked off in January and are working hard every day to bring real representation to this district. We are up against a Republican incumbent who is one of the wealthiest members of Congress. I am running to represent people, not corporate special interests. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

Friend,

I'll cut right to the chase - we need to raise another $2,000,000 before MIDNIGHT TOMORROW in order to hit our End-of-Year goal.

My administration has been working non-stop to Keep America Great while the Democrats have been obstructing our work at EVERY TURN.

We need to keep this country moving forward in 2020 and not let the DO NOTHING DEMOCRATS like Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Chuck Schumer tear down everything we've worked for in the last three years.

This is the biggest FEC fundraising deadline to date, and I noticed that you still haven't done your part to help us reach our goal.

|
Are you with us or are you with the socialists?
**_All contributions made before 11:59 PM TONIGHT will be QUADRUPLE-MATCHED._**

subject: only one day left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13404612/139122967/-403487629?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_AB_all&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I4ODI3OC0zNTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUNUL73Q7Y5fKrcXgXZt3lmq_c609o49XQ1XilA_9Q=)
---
| Hey Peter,

I just left a meeting with Adam where we discussed our fundraising numbers for the quarter. Based on our latest calculations, we’re still $1,898 short of our goal -- with only one day left until the deadline.

We’ve been working day and night in preparation for this deadline. Both Adam and our team have relayed the significance of meeting this goal, but I felt it was necessary to double down on the urgency with only one day to go.

[**Meeting this critical goal will help us build the foundation needed to succeed in 2020. Can we count on you to step up and help us reach this goal? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13404613/139122968/-403487629?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_AB_all&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I4ODI3OC0zNTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUNUL73Q7Y5fKrcXgXZt3lmq_c609o49XQ1XilA_9Q=)
| **[Help us meet our goal! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13404614/139122969/-403487629?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_AB_all&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I4ODI3OC0zNTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUNUL73Q7Y5fKrcXgXZt3lmq_c609o49XQ1XilA_9Q=)**
---

Floridians deserve someone who will fight for them in Washington. I wish you could see how hard Adam is working to build a successful campaign. I’m so proud of him and our team and I know that he’ll carry this passion and drive to Washington to fight for you, Peter.

We’re doing everything we can to hit this goal, but we can’t do it alone. [**Our grassroots supporters have brought us this far and I’m confident that you will step up and help us finish the year strong.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13404615/139122970/-403487629?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.30_b1_AB_all&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I4ODI3OC0zNTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUNUL73Q7Y5fKrcXgXZt3lmq_c609o49XQ1XilA_9Q=)

Thanks for sticking with us,

Amy Bolick
Campaign Manager
Hattersley for Congress

** **

**_Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District._

name: Team Genevieve
subject: FWD: Will you help set us up for 2020?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
URGENT!
---
| | | | | | Peter,
We just wanted to be sure you saw this! Those of us here at Team Genevieve are hard at work to do our part to [flip our Congressional seat RED](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mb1_j1AwD9XWo32FKHSMFNga2lb_gommXPPLwfanb9zNGgmS8nOOTN2uz5gIuBEO4ANZNwTywuIdIcxWKqrtVgg3lQaDAVOrLODum8ToJ3UvFCB7GK-uNU_NlzooO_hAfivyQePuyA0ZlT8_wjFU_pXSlKgXC25AWDbwqSRJ-4UCq65LIRLAiC8Vhti_wKPjnoOPcB3icPw=&c=hC4xBmzzTVbWca6qJSrwX06GoDNjSCipmGhaCIjq8Kx0E7rkI_-xJg==&ch=g8XFufAJ5bGOvQLKKQaWHw6-jHkevceEvzyRpG2kPKchTnA7qyqF3A==) and take free market, common sense conservative representation to DC!
Elections are a group project and it's going to take ALL OF US working together to bring the change we want to see.
Will you donate to sponsor one of the campaign items below or [give another amount?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mb1_j1AwD9XWo32FKHSMFNga2lb_gommXPPLwfanb9zNGgmS8nOOTN2uz5gIuBEO4ANZNwTywuIdIcxWKqrtVgg3lQaDAVOrLODum8ToJ3UvFCB7GK-uNU_NlzooO_hAfivyQePuyA0ZlT8_wjFU_pXSlKgXC25AWDbwqSRJ-4UCq65LIRLAiC8Vhti_wKPjnoOPcB3icPw=&c=hC4xBmzzTVbWca6qJSrwX06GoDNjSCipmGhaCIjq8Kx0E7rkI_-xJg==&ch=g8XFufAJ5bGOvQLKKQaWHw6-jHkevceEvzyRpG2kPKchTnA7qyqF3A==) We have until midnight tomorrow to meet the fundraising deadline and time is running out!
Team Genevieve
---
| \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Genevieve Collins <gdc@gcforcongress.com> Date: Fri, Dec 27, 2019, 8:45 AM Subject: We have a deadline at MIDNIGHT! To: <info@gcforcongress.com>
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mb1_j1AwD9XWo32FKHSMFNga2lb_gommXPPLwfanb9zNGgmS8nOOTH_u-1rZseidQUtUbl_zMhWbPkHDAxABoPo4wBf3Di4YBEpL69x5MS6QuXtY5LbnMhfHpoJMGDCu99nFWOyYUiot6M3_26wKpwDrOrP4-Xajbvp_OwIqcukRWKniLGO2Lp7lURaVZF3rscsZRjhiyklsEjMJVFZ8RvZ-ZUA8UXm9Z5UO5QC7V_II0Iww5VTlK9h5DLTAMFRb&c=hC4xBmzzTVbWca6qJSrwX06GoDNjSCipmGhaCIjq8Kx0E7rkI_-xJg==&ch=g8XFufAJ5bGOvQLKKQaWHw6-jHkevceEvzyRpG2kPKchTnA7qyqF3A==)
---
| Team Genevieve,
It's no secret that Democrats are out of control in this country. As we return from the holiday break, headlines continue to remind us that we are still in a fight for our nation's future.
Yet even as we face the very real threat of socialism and the Democrat's weekly sensationalized headline, I'm optimistic.
[2020 could be one of the best years in our nation's history and we have the chance to make it happen.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mb1_j1AwD9XWo32FKHSMFNga2lb_gommXPPLwfanb9zNGgmS8nOOTH_u-1rZseidQUtUbl_zMhWbPkHDAxABoPo4wBf3Di4YBEpL69x5MS6QuXtY5LbnMhfHpoJMGDCu99nFWOyYUiot6M3_26wKpwDrOrP4-Xajbvp_OwIqcukRWKniLGO2Lp7lURaVZF3rscsZRjhiyklsEjMJVFZ8RvZ-ZUA8UXm9Z5UO5QC7V_II0Iww5VTlK9h5DLTAMFRb&c=hC4xBmzzTVbWca6qJSrwX06GoDNjSCipmGhaCIjq8Kx0E7rkI_-xJg==&ch=g8XFufAJ5bGOvQLKKQaWHw6-jHkevceEvzyRpG2kPKchTnA7qyqF3A==)
2020 could be the year we send effective leadership to DC, take a stand for the free market and conservative values, and flip our district back to red, as it should be.
Will you help me make that happen by covering the cost of much-needed campaign items? If all of us who want to see change put our money where our mouth is, we could get this country back on track!
---

That's why we've set a goal to raise another $25,000 before the most important FEC deadline yet - by _midnight tomorrow_ - and we're falling short.

name: Gary Peters
subject: an update on my race:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's...
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da931/5721a3ed/70667fb4/efb4367/1427277811/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

**If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. **That's why this news is so troubling:

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans started funneling millions to defeat me, hell-bent on buying Michigan's Senate seat. **And now, a recent poll shows me winning by just a single point, 44% to 43%.**

**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan.** That's why my team set a goal to raise $30,000 - but right now, our fundraising is falling short, and we're running out of time.

**Friends, our last FEC deadline of 2019 is coming up, and whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

**[Will you rush $5 right now- every dollar you can before midnight - to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da931/5721a3ed/70667fb4/efb4366/1427277811/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxODAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk180-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

And now, a recent poll shows me winning by just a single point, 44% to 43%. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. That's why my team set a goal to raise $30,000 - but right now, our fundraising is falling short, and we're running out of time. Friends, our last FEC deadline of 2019 is coming up, and whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so I'm counting on your immediate contribution: "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Gary | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth, and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support "" This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address "" We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click "". If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click "" "" |

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Will you make your first online contribution today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We've got two major goals: | |
---
| Friends -

If you've ever said that you were waiting to make your first online donation to our campaign until Ed really needed it, well then today is the day.

Why? Because right now we're coming up on our last FEC deadline of the year, and with it, we've got two major goals:

First, we need to make sure we'll have the resources to compete in 2020. It's going to be an expensive and tough race, and this campaign is powered by people like you.

Second, we need a greater showing of grassroots support than ever before. You see, this is the first full fundraising quarter with both of our opponents in the race. So it's never been more important to make it clear that the people are behind Ed.

That's why your support today matters so much, so I'm asking:

**[Will you make your first online contribution to our campaign right now before our FEC fundraising deadline gets here? There's never been a more important time to have your support.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe8/693b8b0a/4365d859/72de70ee/3299326288/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-1-b")**

This deadline is a big test for our campaign, and how we do is up to you. So if you can afford it, thank you for making a contribution. Every dollar goes a long way. Trust me.

All my best,

John Walsh
Campaign Manager **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe8/693b8b0a/4365d859/72de70ee/3299326288/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-1-b")**

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: I'm all in. Here's why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457e/438185925/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | When I was considering running for Senate, I knew it was going to require everything--and then some. I knew that in order to win we needed to build a whole new kind of politics in Massachusetts--a politics that brings everyone in and leaves no one behind. I knew that the role of a Senator is to be present--to show up in the communities in which they represent. To listen. To learn. I knew that if I was going to ask for votes in September of 2020, I needed to be ready to give the people of Massachusetts everything I had. **And I know that if we are going to build a better future, I can't do it alone. That's why I'm asking you to join our fight:** **[I'm asking you to make a small contribution to our campaign--any amount helps. Even if it's just $1, or $3. It matters.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457f/438185925/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-30-im-all-in&recurring=1&amount=3")** Every dollar our campaign receives is invested to achieve the goals I laid out when thinking about running for Senate. It's for gas in the car to drive out to Western Mass to listen to voters who, for far too long, haven't heard from their Senator. It's for our organizing staff who are recruiting volunteers and making phone calls to spread our message. It's for lawn signs so that every street you turn down you know there is momentum. It's to ensure that your enthusiasm and support are seen everywhere across the Commonwealth. **We're fighting to put the future of our country back in our hands.** **Fighting to meet the promise of this country**. Fulfilling that promise means recognizing that every one of us has something valuable to contribute and that we need leaders who will listen to, encourage, support, and amplify the voices of the people who've been shut out of the old system. If we live up to those goals set at the onset of this campaign--and fight to restore the promise of this country--together, we can win this. **[I hope you'll consider making a contribution to our campaign. With your help, we can truly make an impact. Not only on this race for Senate--but on our politics as a whole.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457f/438185925/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-30-im-all-in&recurring=1&amount=3")** I'm all in. And I hope you are too. _Joe_ [contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457f/438185925/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-30-im-all-in&recurring=1&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f4578/438185925/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f4579/438185925/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457a/438185925/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d18/55b66746/2dc9a2e8/80f457b/438185925/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Texas Battleground HQ
subject: the most important test of our campaign yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What it takes to run a competitive statewide race in Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef0390a/1301608809/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef03909/1301608809/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter,

We're coming up on an important test for this campaign -- **our December end-of-quarter deadline is TOMORROW, and we 're still $47,897 short of our goal.**

Every goal is important, but this one is crucial because our fundraising numbers become public. That means it's our last chance before the primary to prove that we can build the resources we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn. We've got the momentum now, **but there are still a lot of undecided voters and we need to show them that MJ is the best candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn in the general election.**

**So Peter, will you make your first* donation before tomorrow 's midnight deadline to help us reach our December goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 ($10 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef03908/1301608809/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 ($20 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef0390f/1301608809/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $20.20 ($40.40 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef0390e/1301608809/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=20.20")**
**[Express donate $25 ($50 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef0390d/1301608809/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 ($100 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef0390c/1301608809/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef03903/1301608809/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__")**
Running a competitive statewide race in Texas will take a lot of resources. If we're going to reach voters across the Lone Star State's **254 counties, 20 media markets, and numerous major cities** , we need your support so we can:
* **Hire staff** to support our growing statewide operation
* **Fuel MJ 's travel across the state** so she can hear from Texans about their concerns
* **Recruit volunteers** to help us run a grassroots-powered campaign
* **Run ads** to spread MJ's message on TV, the radio, and the internet

Unlike Senator Cornyn, who's taken _millions_ from corporate PACs over the years, MJ isn't taking any. So she's relying on hardworking grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign.

**[With less than 48 hours until the deadline, will you make a matched donation now to help us reach our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef03909/1301608809/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks for your support,
Team MJ

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update._

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062b/7f51f7bc/4a319856/4ef03909/1301608809/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.1nd__689__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

name: TULSI 2020
subject: We’re reaching the end
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13406310/139141109/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzNjI4Yy0zYzJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmjcSzWAUpzwNmqdIZQ5htuB7LGJLqlnHOlY9Ku6Gfc=&emci=f6280186-3c2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=7a53628c-3c2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Friend — **The year will end in one of two ways:** #1: Our people powered movement will continue to beat the odds and exceed our $1 million goal to keep Tulsi competitive in the early states ahead of primary season... OR #2: We fall behind and go into the first votes of the election letting the billionaires dominate local TV airwaves with their tired establishment messages, allowing candidates who profit from the American war machine, and who accept PAC and corporate money to take the competitive advantage. **Here’s some good news: We’re on track for #1.** **And if everyone reading this email chips in $12 right now, we can smash through our ambitious goal AHEAD of schedule and showcase the strength of our movement.** [**We have until midnight on the 31st to reach our ambitious and critical goal of raising 1 million dollars to get our message out in the early voting states ahead of primary season. We’re asking you directly if you will give $12 now to help Tulsi stay competitive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13406311/139141110/33532995?amount=12&refcode=em191230_ask&refcode2=7a53628c-3c2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzNjI4Yy0zYzJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmjcSzWAUpzwNmqdIZQ5htuB7LGJLqlnHOlY9Ku6Gfc=) | [DONATE » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13406319/139141118/33532995?refcode=em191230_button_1&refcode2=7a53628c-3c2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzNjI4Yy0zYzJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmjcSzWAUpzwNmqdIZQ5htuB7LGJLqlnHOlY9Ku6Gfc= "Donate now")
---
Ours is a story of a campaign of, by, and for the people — and we’re writing it as we speak.

name: Cory Booker
subject: A quick update before the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I promise, this is short. Friend, I want to keep this note short. We're close to having the best fundraising quarter of this campaign -- but as of this morning, we're not on track to reach our critical $800,000 goal. My team tells me we're $159,306 away, which means we're falling behind. If we can pull this off by tomorrow night at midnight, it'll be a huge sign of what's to come at the Iowa caucuses. **If 146 people from Pennsylvania chip in, we 'll secure our best fundraising quarter and hit our end-of-year goal of $800,000. Can I count on you to chip in to get us there?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

clean_body: | | | | I promise, this is short. Friend, I want to keep this note short. We're close to having the best fundraising quarter of this campaign -- but as of this morning, we're not on track to reach our critical $800,000 goal. My team tells me we're $159,306 away, which means we're falling behind. If we can pull this off by tomorrow night at midnight, it'll be a huge sign of what's to come at the Iowa caucuses. If 146 people from Pennsylvania chip in, we 'll secure our best fundraising quarter and hit our end-of-year goal of $800,000. Can I count on you to chip in to get us there? name: Nate
subject: 36 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm Nate, Admiral Franken's finance director. It's my job to make sure our campaign has the resources to win this election.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi folks, you might remember me -- I'm Nate, Admiral Franken's finance director. It's my job to make sure our campaign has the resources needed to win this election. And on that note, I just got off the phone with Kimberley because we're lagging a bit to hit our goal. We need to raise $10,306 in the next 8 hours to get back on track. **[Can you chip in to help us catch up?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b993f/649785774/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_L1&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9938/649785774/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_btn&amount=15")
---
These goals are so important to make, team. As soon as the books close in January, we have to publicly report our finances.
That means that opponents and allies alike will be able to judge the strength of our campaign. If we don't finish the year strong, allies might not help us, and our opponents may try to knock us out with early spending.
**[We can avoid that, but only if supporters like you, friend, chip in and help us catch up today. Click here, and please give anything you can.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9939/649785774/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_L2&amount=15")**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
[**$10**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b993a/649785774/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true") | **[$25](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b993b/649785774/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9934/649785774/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9935/649785774/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9936/649785774/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c2/33365068/4a61c2a3/3f8b9937/649785774/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230am_em_fr_all_eoy3_abx6&amount=15")**
Thank you,
Nate Clem
Finance Director
Franken for Iowa

name: Jason Yates
subject: 2020 Vision
body:
| | Peter, 2020 is upon us. Have you thought about how 20/20 also refers to clear vision? All the political craziness in our nation is a reminder that people need clarity. When we enter the voting booth in 2020, we must see clearly the assault on religious freedom and the growing disregard for life. We must recognize that biblical principles are secured when justice is upheld in our courts, policies welcome faith in the public square, and elected leaders fear God. **[You can bring clarity to the polls in 2020 by making a donation now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191230apl01nd&n=1).** Activate Ten Christian Voters - $32
Using advanced marketing, your support will help identify and reach non-voting Christians with resources to think biblically and vote in 2020. Equip a Church - $250
Your support will provide a church and the pastor with all the tools (sermon outlines, small-group studies, get-out-the-vote packets, and more) to equip the congregation to vote. Equip a Christian University - $500
We’re partnering with Christian Colleges and Universities, and your support will provide the latest voting tools to help students register to vote and access biblical worldview resources to inform their votes. Provide a State Voter Guide - $1,500
You can help cover the cost to publish an online voting guide in your state, covering the complete ballot for every voter in every election from federal to local. Thank you for including My Faith Votes in your year-end giving. The investment you make now will be felt for generations to come. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl05?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191230apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191230apl01nd&n=3)

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Give me a chance to explain
body:
Here is the truth
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93c5/673463939/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to do something very important to the success of our campaign. I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign. Give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here's the truth:
Tomorrow night we close the books on the last FEC fundraising deadline of the year. And it's a big one.
Because right now, television ads are on the air in our race and our opponent is raising huge sums of money with the help of Donald Trump and other Washington Republicans.
Our campaign raises money differently. We have received more than 100,000 individual donations, mostly small donations, from people who know how important it is to win this seat.
And between now and tomorrow night, we need to do everything we possibly can to raise as much as we can to fight back before our deadline ends.
So here comes the part where I ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our final, critical FEC fundraising deadline of the year comes to a close tomorrow at midnight? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93c4/673463939/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-1-full")
Thank you again for everything you've done to support this campaign since we launched. We are in a great position to win this race and if we keep going, if we keep fighting, that is just what we are going to do.
All my best,
Sara Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93c4/673463939/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93db/673463939/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93da/673463939/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1f/4bef7a87/6a01d3ee/287f93d9/673463939/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Ryan
subject: Our focus right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
We need to start 2020 strong | | Team -- It's a hectic time of year, and every day it seems like more big news comes out of Washington. **Here 's what is important right now:**
1. Democrats in the House have passed nearly 400 bills that would raise wages, expand health coverage, lower prescription drug prices, re-enter the Paris Climate Accords, and create universal background checks. Mitch McConnell and the Republican Senate have done nothing.
2. Six Republican challengers have jumped into our race, with national Republicans promising to pour huge amounts of special-interest money into OH-13. One of them, Christina Hagan, wrote the "Heartbeat Bill" that criminalized abortions before most women even know they're pregnant in Ohio, and she was one of the main architects of Senate Bill 5 which would have stripped public employees of their collective bargaining rights.
3. This Tuesday, December 31, is the first FEC deadline since the House voted to impeach Trump and hold him accountable for trying to corrupt our elections.

The GOP knows Tim is fighting to keep good jobs in Northeast Ohio and make quality healthcare and education accessible to every American. Right-wing special interests have a target on our district. If we don't end this quarter strong, they'll go after Tim even stronger. #
Meet Tim Ryan

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. clean_body: We need to start 2020 strong | | Team -- It's a hectic time of year, and every day it seems like more big news comes out of Washington. Here 's what is important right now: 1. Democrats in the House have passed nearly 400 bills that would raise wages, expand health coverage, lower prescription drug prices, re-enter the Paris Climate Accords, and create universal background checks. Mitch McConnell and the Republican Senate have done nothing. 2. Six Republican challengers have jumped into our race, with national Republicans promising to pour huge amounts of special-interest money into OH-13. One of them, Christina Hagan, wrote the "Heartbeat Bill" that criminalized abortions before most women even know they're pregnant in Ohio, and she was one of the main architects of Senate Bill 5 which would have stripped public employees of their collective bargaining rights. 3. This Tuesday, December 31, is the first FEC deadline since the House voted to impeach Trump and hold him accountable for trying to corrupt our elections. The GOP knows Tim is fighting to keep good jobs in Northeast Ohio and make quality healthcare and education accessible to every American. Right-wing special interests have a target on our district. If we don't end this quarter strong, they'll go after Tim even stronger. Our campaign is funded by real people who believe in Tim's vision. "" ** "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you. \-- Team Ryan | | Meet Tim Ryan Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since. | | Tim Ryan for Congress P.O. I wanted to give you an update on how our December fundraising goal is going so far!

As you can see, we are making some progress towards our end of quarter goal of $4,000 but we are still very much behind.

My team is concerned that the holiday craze may cause us to fall behind. However, if 53 donors step up right now and donate we might be able to stay on track.

>
Elizabeth is running to be the best president that money can't buy. She's not collecting donations for this campaign by hosting fancy fundraising events where you can only meet her if you can write a big check. And she's not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

Asking supporters like you to chip in to emails like this is the only way we're going to catch up to this critical goal by Tuesday's deadline. She has the plans, but you have the power to make them a reality.

**[Elizabeth's running a 100% grassroots-funded campaign-- and that means that she's relying on you to help close this gap. His leaked emails from 2015 and 2016 demonstrate the depths of just how twisted he is: In the wake of Dylann Roof murdering nine black churchgoers in Charleston, Miller emailed about how upset he was that Amazon and other retailers were reacting by ending the sale of Confederate flags from their sites. name: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
subject: I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
The FEC's last fundraising deadline of the year is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. We need to make a strong statement to the liberals that we're not going to put up with any more of their partisan games. Can I count on you to chip in to our efforts?

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**
\- From the Desk of Senator Marsha Blackburn -**

Dear Peter,

I hope this email finds you well-rested and that you've been able to find some time to spend with family, friends and loved ones over the holidays.

As you know, we're closing in on the end of the year and very quickly approaching what will be one of the biggest elections in history.

_Since election night in 2016, the Democrats have refused to accept the outcome --and Donald Trump as their President._

For nearly four years, they've done nothing but throw tantrums, distract and obstruct. And their latest act of political theater--the impeachment sham--demonstrates they're desperate and will do anything to gain power.

This means [**we have to prepare for an all-out battle to defend President Trump 's conservative Senate Majority and protect the White House**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0). We're up against the Left's political machine, fueled with hatred and funded by liberal Hollywood elites.

I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter.

**The FEC 's last fundraising deadline of the year is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT.** We need to make a strong statement to the liberals that we're not going to put up with any more of their partisan games. Can I count on you to chip in to our efforts?

**All contributions made through the deadline are being matched 400%!**

[**Join the fight, chip in today >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

How we start the year will set the tone for the rest of the election cycle, Peter. President Trump and all of the conservatives fighting to advance our agenda need to know we have their back.

That's why I'm calling on Team Marsha, one of the strongest grassroots teams in the NATION, to step up and chip in.

You defended the Senate Majority last year.

Next year, the Senate AND the White House are on the line.

_So where will you stand, Peter? _

[**Stand with President Trump & the conservative Senate Majority**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you in advance for your commitment to the conservative agenda and dedication to defending our values from the radical Left's attacks. I hope I can count on you to join our fight.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

[**Get 4X matched - DONATE NOW**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and
Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---
Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE0MzkzOTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjYzNjU1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager
subject: We’ve never seen anything like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress Mondaire Jones for Congress
body:
That goal isn’t just a number. It represents the resources we need in order to remain competitive in this race, because there’s no shortage of corporate opponents vying to defeat us. | | | Hi Friend,
It’s Charlie Blaettler, Mondaire’s campaign manager, and I have some incredible news. Last week, our team got some _really_ concerning numbers. We had a goal of reaching 3,000 grassroots contributions before midnight on December 31st, and we weren’t even close to making it there. **So we asked for your help.** _And then hundreds of folks stepped up to fuel this progressive campaign._ If we can keep this up until midnight tomorrow, I know we can meet this critical goal. **[So I’m asking you personally: Can you join your neighbors and fellow progressives with a grassroots donation of $5 before our critical December 31st FEC deadline?
