name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Cory Gardner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I'll make this quick. Our year-end FEC fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow and before I ask you to donate again, I wanted to pause and explain what this deadline means for our campaign. We're up against an incumbent Republican senator who is undermining progress on issues like health care and climate change by following in lockstep with Mitch McConnell's obstruction and partisan political games and voting 98% of the time with Donald Trump. Because he's a reliable vote for the Trump-McConnell agenda, we expect deep-pocketed Republican interests to come through for him so he can report a very strong number to the FEC next month. Our campaign also needs strong numbers, but we need to do it the right way: no money from corporate PACs, no right-wing megadonors -- just everyday folks stepping up to help us flip this seat. [**We 're so close to hitting our $500,000 year-end fundraising goal before the deadline, so that's why I'm asking you one more time to make a contribution of $10 or more today:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191230-eoy?refcode=em-191230-98-percent-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191230-eoy?refcode=em-191230-98-percent-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Every single day, folks like you are stepping up to support our campaign and helping us even the odds against our Republican opponent and his supporters in Trump and McConnell's networks. Thanks, -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191230-eoy?refcode=em-191230-98-percent-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Deadline
body:
I need a quick favor. |
---
| | Peter, I need a quick favor.

I decided to run for Congress because I want my grandkids to inherit an America that is safe, prosperous, and free. That's the American dream, for each generation to leave behind for their kids a better country than they received.

Kendra Horn says she believes the same thing, but her impeachment-above-all voting record and status as one of Pelosi's top rubber-stamps say otherwise. We can beat her in 2020. I'm sure of it. But we need a strong conservative who won't go along to get along in Washington to replace her.

[**I'm ready for that fight. I'm ready to fight for you.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8c4c6377aa&e=795c6d9796) The founding values of this country, the conservative Oklahoma values I hold dear, are worth defending. We have no other choice.

[**The final fundraising period of the year ends tomorrow, Tuesday Dec. 31st, at midnight. It's one of the most important deadlines of this congressional race.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9c22dca3e2&e=795c6d9796)

[**Will you please donate just $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 today to help us fight and win this primary, beat Kendra Horn, and defend Oklahoma values in the Swamp?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1fc8f30e08&e=795c6d9796) Now is the time to act, 2020 is almost here. Let's win together.
For Freedom, Janet Barresi

clean_body: I need a quick favor. | | | Peter, I need a quick favor. I decided to run for Congress because I want my grandkids to inherit an America that is safe, prosperous, and free. That's the American dream, for each generation to leave behind for their kids a better country than they received. Kendra Horn says she believes the same thing, but her impeachment-above-all voting record and status as one of Pelosi's top rubber-stamps say otherwise. We can beat her in 2020. I'm sure of it. But we need a strong conservative who won't go along to get along in Washington to replace her. The founding values of this country, the conservative Oklahoma values I hold dear, are worth defending. We have no other choice. Now is the time to act, 2020 is almost here. Let's win together. For Freedom, Janet Barresi | | | | Copyright © 2019 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved.

Our plans are made and I’m feeling great about where we stand... but there’s one thing left to do before the clock strikes midnight on December 31st: MEET OUR FUNDRAISING GOALS.

Right now, we’re just $6,409 short of what we need for December. Can you chip in now to help close the gap?

Peter, I know a lot of campaigns are slowing down right now with the holidays...

But we cannot afford to let up now.

I’m determined to keep up our hard work. I refuse to slow down. We have to keep going strong to the finish line if we want to defeat the socialist agenda and win big in 2020.

And I really need supporters like you to help me ring in the new year on the best note.

Maria

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96c/3eb3e2fc/6a495b87/744ed3c9/40706399/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191230_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191230_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Rep. Michael Burgess endorses Amanda Makki for Congress
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amandamakki/amandamakkiforcongress?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | |
---
| | | **For Immediate Release**
December 30, 2019

**Contact**
Sarah Bascom, sarah@bascomllc.com, 850.294.6636
Kristen Bridges, kristen@bascomllc.com, 850.545.1917

**Texas Congressman Michael Burgess, M.D. Endorses Amanda Makki**
**Physicians from the “Doc Caucus” continue to line up in support of Makki**

St. Petersburg, FL—Today, Texas Congressman and physician Michael Burgess throws his support behind conservative candidate Amanda Makki, the clear conservative candidate to unseat ineffective and extreme liberal Charlie Crist next November.

“You don’t have to be from Florida to know that people are unhappy with House Democratic Leadership and looking for a change,” said Congressman Burgess. “Amanda Makki is a fighter, an experienced healthcare policy expert and advocate, and she’s just the conservative that the
people of Florida need representing them in Congress. As a physician, I look forward to working with her to reduce the cost of prescription drugs and to find sensible, conservative solutions to our country’s healthcare crisis.”

Congressman Burgess is the second physician from the Doctor Caucus to endorse Amanda Makki to replace Charlie Crist and fight for conservative healthcare reform. This new endorsement comes on the heels of Florida Congressman and medical doctor Neal Dunn’s support for Makki saying, “Pinellas County and our country would be fortunate to have her serving in the United States Congress.”

“Healthcare is one of my top priorities. On day one, I will join forces with the loudest voices in Congress fighting to repeal and replace Obamacare and lower healthcare costs for seniors. It cannot be any more crucial, and I am honored to have Dr. Burgess’ support,” said Makki.
Amanda Makki is the clear conservative front runner, has raised more than double all her Republican opponents combined, and now boasts more than eight major endorsements.
---

You may think Washington is just filled with people yelling at each other right now, but Tina has been hard at work on behalf of Minnesotans every single day she's been in the Senate. Here's a quick update on what she's fought for:

• Legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, improve rural health care, and support our health care workforce;

• Tackling the climate crisis by securing federal funding to restore our Great Lakes and studying the impacts of climate change on our economy;

• Getting measures to protect affordable housing and rural broadband, support the economy, and bolster education programs included in the government spending package.

Unlike a lot of politicians who are in it for the wrong reasons, Tina jumped in the fight because she didn't see anyone sticking up for folks who have been left behind -- or flat-out ignored by Washington.

That's why she's working day and night to do right by the people of Minnesota. It's important Tina continues her important work in the Senate, so we're asking:

**Can you add a donation to support Tina before our most important FEC deadline of the year? Our team relies on contributions from individual donors like you pitching in whatever you can afford to hit our goals.**

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: BOLD
body:
Hoping you can give this a quick read
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f935b/2321274954/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Friends -**
**Can** you do something important today? **Sara Gideon** is really hoping that she can **count on you** before it's too late.
In just about twenty-four hours we'll come to the end of our final official FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Our job is **to make** up the gap between where we were at this point last quarter and where we are at today.
**A $3 donation** from you would go a long way. Because the truth is, it's not just about how much money we raise, but how many donations **to our campaign** we receive to make up that number.
**Our final FEC deadline of the year is almost here,** so we have to ask. **This is important.**
[**Friends - can Sara Gideon count on you to make a $3 donation to our campaign? Our final FEC deadline of the year is almost here. This is important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f935a/2321274954/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-2-a")
Thank you for your continued support of Sara Gideon's campaign. Susan Collins has the backing of the entire Washington, D.C. Republican establishment. But we have something Susan Collins doesn't have, and that is lots and lots of people.
All our best,
Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f935a/2321274954/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-2-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f9359/2321274954/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f9358/2321274954/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1e/4bef7a87/6a03494a/287f935f/2321274954/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I sent a letter to the DNC and Chairman Tom Perez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y) Yang Gang --

In it, I made a simple ask: With the extreme lack of polling, the increased thresholds to qualify for debates, and time running out, will the DNC commission qualifying polls to accurately gauge voter support in the early states?

**I believe we would be doing a disservice to the party, grassroots Democrats across the country, and every candidate in the race if we choose who is on the January stage by the whims of when the media conducts polls.

[The DNC has yet to respond -- which means we might only have a single poll in two or more early states with which to qualify. We have to go all-in in this moment to hit our end-of-quarter goal and double down on our organizing and advertising. Can I count on you to donate $10 or more now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=5&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=11&amount=25&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---
Once again we’re faced with a challenge. Perhaps one of the biggest we’ve faced on this campaign.

5% in four polls or 7% in two polls. That’s what we need to qualify. **But we believe this is within reach if this team steps up and we organize with everything we have.

[Can you help fund our organizing efforts and push us over the top? Contribute $10 now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=12&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)**

This movement is only growing -- and we can’t let anyone silence the almost 400,000 individuals across the country who’ve pitched in their hard-earned dollars to build this campaign.

I hope I can count on you to stand with me.

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20882?t=13&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5358%2E377263%2Ek90e0y) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Laura Loomer
subject: President Trump Recognizes my campaign: Left Loses It!
body:
I didn’t expect the President of the United States to recognize my run for Congress – especially before I’m even on the ballot!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358749-838206-4798504-fb0b0ee6e0-34abb59579)
Patriot,

I didn’t expect the President of the United States to recognize my run for Congress – especially before I’m even on the ballot!

But on Saturday, President Trump tweeted an article from one of my biggest supporters that included a call-to-action to donate to my campaign:

While the article discussed my candidacy and included a campaign video that addressed illegal immigration, the President was bringing attention to the tragic story of Annette Bear, who was killed by a Mexican national and illegal alien, Juan Sanchez.

Sanchez had previously been deported SIX TIMES in the last decade!

Rather than focus on this story and the ongoing threat of illegal immigration, the Leftist media instead acted like kids who had their candy stolen because President Trump highlighted my campaign.

Liberal Daily Beast contributor Justin Baragona quickly tweeted this:

Even Never-Trumper-in-Chief George Conway got in on the action:

My campaign team is expecting a BARRAGE of negative media because our President was doing the right thing and highlighting yet another murder of an American by an illegal alien.

And that’s just fine with me.

I have met with the families of women and children killed by illegal aliens. And while I could never fully even imagine their pain, I can see it in their eyes.

I could feel it as their trembling hands firmly gripped mine as they pleaded for help.

The Liberal Media will never get that because they refuse to even recognize the death of Americans at the hands of illegal criminals who should have never set foot on American soil.

But I do, and I know you do as well.

One reason I’m running for Congress is to fulfill a promise I’ve made to those families who have lost so much.

I promised I would do whatever I can, so another mother, father, son or daughter doesn’t become another victim of illegal immigration.

With just one day left until the FEC deadline, I ask that you help me fulfill that promise and [**send me to Washington**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358749-838206-4798503-b555f44b7b-34abb59579).

If you haven’t given this quarter, or if you can give again, [**please donate all that you can today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358749-838206-4798503-b555f44b7b-34abb59579).

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Laura Loomer

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358749-838206-4798503-b555f44b7b-34abb59579)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-358749-838206-84585d41bbe610b-34abb59579)

name: Benjamin
subject: The Last of December
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is our last deadline before the primary date.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e8/7dfbb003/42a9b0b9/5527c6b1/4005314781/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Friend,

We are poised to take back the House in North Carolina's 2nd District in 2020. With the new district lines, NC-02 is more likely to flip blue than ever!

But we are in a crowded primary, and when we flip the 2nd District, we must ensure it's Monika representing us there. Monika is the most qualified person for the job:
* We've seen Monika lead this campaign with integrity, intention, and an attitude of service--exactly the way she plans to advocate for us all in Congress.
* She has spent the last twenty years advocating for thousands of women and children. Congress needs less politicians... and more advocates.
* She is currently serving her third term on the Board of Education for one of the LARGEST school districts in the country.

**We are staying focused on the primary date: March 3, 2020.** But tomorrow--December 31--is our very last major fundraising deadline before voters make their first decisions.

[**We've got a tough road ahead of us. Will you help us raise the funds we need to tell more voters about Monika's vision for the 2nd District?**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e8/7dfbb003/42a9b0b9/5527c6b6/4005314781/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mjhfornc") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e8/7dfbb003/42a9b0b9/5527c6b7/4005314781/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5")

Thank you,

Benjamin Woods, Campaign Manager
Monika for Congress
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. clean_body: This is our last deadline before the primary date. | "" Friend, We are poised to take back the House in North Carolina's 2nd District in 2020. With the new district lines, NC-02 is more likely to flip blue than ever! But we are in a crowded primary, and when we flip the 2nd District, we must ensure it's Monika representing us there. Monika is the most qualified person for the job: We've seen Monika lead this campaign with integrity, intention, and an attitude of service--exactly the way she plans to advocate for us all in Congress. She has spent the last twenty years advocating for thousands of women and children. Congress needs less politicians... and more advocates. She is currently serving her third term on the Board of Education for one of the LARGEST school districts in the country. We are staying focused on the primary date: March 3, 2020.** But tomorrow--December 31--is our very last major fundraising deadline before voters make their first decisions. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Thank you, Benjamin Woods, Campaign Manager Monika for Congress | | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. "" PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS Monika for Congress PO BOX 99092 Raleigh, NC 27624 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: 36 Hours
body:
Will you make 'em count?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/36-hours?e=41f8e27552)

Friends,

I’ll keep this short, as time is very short.

We are just 36 hours from the December 31^st finance reporting deadline.

We need to raise another $14,730 to reach our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow night.

Will you help close the gap?

Any amount will get us that much closer toward meeting our goal. $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 will have an immediate impact. Truly any amount, large or small will make the difference as we work to close the remaining gap and finish 2019 strong.

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=72a29694d6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-72a29694d6-180644441)

The Washington and Topeka lobbyists have bet their money on “reliable” politicians in the race to deliver for their special interests. It’s up to Kansans like you and me to fight for this US Senate seat to ensure our next Kansas U.S. senator speaks and fights for us, not for the open checkbooks of the swamp.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=72a29694d6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-72a29694d6-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. Don't forget to follow us online: www.lindstromforsenate.com and on social media @LindstromforKS

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: Jessica Cisneros
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
She has what it takes to win, but she cannot do it alone.
#

Peter,
I'm reaching out to you today to ask you to support Jessica Cisneros' campaign for Congress in Texas' 28th Congressional District.
Jessica is an exceptional candidate. That's why she was one of my first endorsements this year. She has what it takes to win, but she cannot do it alone.
**[Will you make a $3 donation to Jessica's campaign before the December 31st FEC deadline to help her reach her fundraising goals?](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57e6f/29362a23/2586c093/57bf0e35/4175907874/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS10MiJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191230-1-t2")**
There are few people I've met who are as passionate about serving their community as Jessica. Born and raised in the border town of Laredo, Jessica became an immigration attorney to fight for the rights of migrants.
After seeing too many families torn apart by this administration's immigration policies, and learning that her own Democratic Congressman was supporting those policies in Washington, Jessica decided to run for Congress. She's fighting for a brighter future for her neighbors in Texas' 28th district.
I need partners like Jessica fighting by my side in Congress next year. We need more fearless women of color in Congress who will fight for reproductive rights, Medicare for All, and the Green New Deal.
Jessica has done the work to win but needs our help to get across the finish line.
**[Make a $3 donation to Jessica before the end of the year to help her start strong in 2020. There are powerful interests who are going to try to stop her and our movement, so we need to be prepared to fight back.](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57e6f/29362a23/2586c093/57bf0e35/4175907874/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS10MiJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191230-1-t2")**
Our movement can create a seismic shift. I know it. You know it. So let's get it done.
In solidarity,
Ayanna Pressley
**[DONATE](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57e6f/29362a23/2586c093/57bf0e35/4175907874/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMS10MiJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191230-1-t2")**

* * *
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
---

Laredo, TX 78045 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Ad claims Collins sides with "big corporations" over small businesses; facts prove otherwise
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
_**FACT CHECK:**_
**TV Ad Funded by Secret Donors Attempts to Distort Senator Collins ' Record of Helping Maine's Small Businesses**
_**Ad claims Collins sides with "big corporations" over small businesses; facts prove otherwise**_
**Bangor, ME** - The "dark money group," Maine Momentum, also known as "16 Counties," is once again spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on negative TV ads in an attempt to smear Senator Susan Collins and mislead Maine voters.
But consider the source. Maine Momentum [has already been discredited](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) by the Washington Post's non-partisan fact checker for having a history of making false claims, and it continues to refuse to disclose who is funding this shadowy organization.
The group's most recent false ad features two small brewers in Washington County who claim Senator Collins sides with "big corporations" over Maine's small businesses.

The problem is, yet again, they're wrong.
_**Here are the facts:**_
* _****__****_****Susan has always been a strong supporter of Maine 's small businesses. Her family still runs a fifth-generation retail lumber business based in Caribou.
* Our nation's leading small business organization, the National Federal of Independent Business (NFIB), has consistently named Susan a "Guardian of Small Business" for her strong defense of small businesses.
* [Tax reform boosts small businesses](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0). Maine Revenue Services called the 2017 tax reform law a **billion-dollar stimulus to Maine 's** **economy** last year.
* Most recently, a federal funding bill was signed into law that includes a total of $18.5 million **that directly benefits small breweries** , including more than 135 that are making beer right here in Maine. This bill includes a one-year extension of the Craft Beverage Modernization and Tax Reform Act that was authored by Senators Collins and Ben Cardin (D-MD) and was originally included in the 2017 tax cut bill. [The President and CEO of the Brewers Association](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) calls these lower rates a "boon to small and independent brewers located in all 50 states..." and "these savings empowered brewers to reinvest in their businesses and resulted in an annual tax savings of more than $80 million."

In addition, the ad, yet again, makes a **blatantly false** claim about corporate donations to Senator Collins:
The ad claims "Susan Collins took $5 million in contributions from big corporations."
**This is false.**
**Susan Collins has not taken any money from corporate donors.** Why? Because it is against federal election law for candidates to take money from corporations.
The truth is, as Speaker of the Maine House, **Sara Gideon, one of Collins ' opponents, is the only one who has [taken money directly from corporations.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
But, as we have said before, this is how shadowy groups like "Maine Momentum" work. They funnel money from unknown, often out-of-state, sources into Maine and they deceive voters with a reckless disregard for the truth.
It's not surprising that allies of Sara Gideon, who [Maine Ethics Commission found guilty](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) of violating federal campaign finance laws involving straw donations and corporate money, would play these kinds of dark money games.
_****_
_****_
[
SusanCollins.com
](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Collins for Senator

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDE0NDM5MjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjY4ODEwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We just got out there every single day and fought our hearts out -- for an Ultra-Millionaire Tax, for Universal... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfc1/45c30650/11528370d/66fd61b6/1473486462/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**I 'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign -- because we have a powerfully important goal to reach, and less than 48 hours to do it.**

We have our most important FEC deadline yet coming up on December 31. This is the last deadline before early voting begins in mid-January.

We have a plan to organize in all 50 states -- and build a grassroots movement in communities all over the country. **We're taking our message to voters far and wide and giving people a reason to show up and vote.** And we can't do it without you.

Our fundraising is still behind last quarter, but we're not done fighting yet -- and we've made some progress toward our $20 million goal.

**[I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to get our campaign to our $20 million goal -- and we don't have a lot of time left to get this done. >
December 31 isn't just the FEC fundraising deadline -- it's also the one-year anniversary of this campaign.

When we began, we didn't know what the response would be, or how far we would go.

We just got out there every single day and fought our hearts out -- for an Ultra-Millionaire Tax, for Universal Child Care, for student loan debt cancellation, and so much more.

Now, we've put out the plans. The rich and powerful have been put on notice. And, fighting side by side, we're closer to turning each and every one of them into reality.

**In 2020, we 'll keep fighting for an America that works for everyone. But first, we need to keep investing in this grassroots movement -- because it's the only way to win.**

In the last two days of this year, we have an opportunity to set the tone for 2020. If we keep building our grassroots movement -- dollar by dollar, quarter after quarter, -- we can show the rich and powerful that change is coming sooner than they think.

**[We have one last deadline to go. If you can, please make your first contribution to help hit our goal before tomorrow 's FEC deadline, and help build the strongest 2020 campaign possible.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfc1/45c30650/11528370d/66fd61b8/1473486462/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJBRl9FT1FfR09MX0VfMjAxOTEyMzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2AF_EOQ_GOL_E_20191230_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: When we began, we didn't know what the response would be, or how far we would go. We just got out there every single day and fought our hearts out -- for an Ultra-Millionaire Tax, for Universal... | | | "" I 'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign -- because we have a powerfully important goal to reach, and less than 48 hours to do it. We have our most important FEC deadline yet coming up on December 31. This is the last deadline before early voting begins in mid-January. We have a plan to organize in all 50 states -- and build a grassroots movement in communities all over the country. We're taking our message to voters far and wide and giving people a reason to show up and vote. And we can't do it without you. Our fundraising is still behind last quarter, but we're not done fighting yet -- and we've made some progress toward our $20 million goal. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" December 31 isn't just the FEC fundraising deadline -- it's also the one-year anniversary of this campaign. When we began, we didn't know what the response would be, or how far we would go. We just got out there every single day and fought our hearts out -- for an Ultra-Millionaire Tax, for Universal Child Care, for student loan debt cancellation, and so much more. Now, we've put out the plans. The rich and powerful have been put on notice. And, fighting side by side, we're closer to turning each and every one of them into reality. In 2020, we 'll keep fighting for an America that works for everyone. But first, we need to keep investing in this grassroots movement -- because it's the only way to win. In the last two days of this year, we have an opportunity to set the tone for 2020. If we keep building our grassroots movement -- dollar by dollar, quarter after quarter, -- we can show the rich and powerful that change is coming sooner than they think. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Team MJ
subject: six more years of Mitch McConnell's right-hand man?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator Cornyn has stood with Mitch McConnell and in the way of badly needed progress on nearly every major issue.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396e/1318942466/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **" It's been a pleasure to stand shoulder to shoulder with [Senator Cornyn.]"**
\-- Senate Majority Leader's Website

[**Make a matched donation to defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man before our end-of-quarter deadline >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter,

For nearly two decades, Senator John Cornyn has prioritized the demands of his party leaders in Washington over the needs of Texans. As McConnell's right-hand man, Senator Cornyn has played a key role in advancing his harmful agenda -- McConnell even praised Senator Cornyn, saying "it's been a pleasure to stand shoulder to shoulder with him."
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 ($10 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396c/1318942466/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 ($20 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef03963/1318942466/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $20.20 ($40.40 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef03962/1318942466/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=20.20")**
**[Express donate $25 ($50 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef03961/1318942466/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 ($100 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef03960/1318942466/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef03967/1318942466/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__")**
Senator Cornyn voted to gut protections for millions of Texans with pre-existing conditions and to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans more for health care coverage **because McConnell and his insurance industry backers wanted it.**

On immigration, Senator Cornyn has stood in the way of just about every sensible solution that's come before the Senate. **When a bipartisan immigration reform bill passed with more than a two-thirds majority, Senator Cornyn joined Mitch McConnell to vote against it.

[Donate to help us defeat McConnell's deputy and your gift will be matched >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We can't afford another six years of a senator who will advance Mitch McConnell's agenda, who refuses to defend our access to health care, and who stands in the way of badly needed progress on major issues affecting working Texans. **[Rush a matched donation now>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")

MJ is different. She's not a career politician laser-focused on getting elected, then reelected, over and over again. From taking on the government to open ground combat roles in the military to women, to flying rescue missions in Afghanistan, she has always been focused on fighting for what's right. With your help, she'll do the same in the U.S. Senate.

[Will you make a matched donation to make sure that MJ is the candidate who faces off against -- and beats -- Senator Cornyn next November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,
Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890635/7f51f7bc/4a323796/4ef0396d/1318942466/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.2nd__696__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: According to the Center for American Progress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "Nearly 120 million eligible Americans did not participate in the November elections." \-- Center for American Progress on the 2018 election. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **As of today, do you plan to vote in 2020?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6c/6e9863e8/1761ae26/1db04aae/809305523/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/m-QTpnEC") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6c/6e9863e8/1761ae26/1db04aae/809305523/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/m-QTpnEC") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6c/6e9863e8/1761ae26/1db04aac/809305523/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191230b.ND&refcode2=rzv9W3OxRZvT79sySclK")

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: end 2019 strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Leftists have spent an entire year hiding the truth. They don't want you to know that Washington Republicans have secured major tax cuts for Lehigh Peter, Leftists have spent an entire year hiding the truth.
They don't want you to know that Washington Republicans have secured major tax cuts for Lehigh Valley families.
They don't want you to know that the American economy is doing better than ever.
No, all they want to talk about is impeachment... smearing the president and every single Republican that opposes their radical agenda.
But, Peter, I know you don't believe them. And with our FINAL deadline of the year coming in just a matter of days, we have a chance to put an exact dollar amount on our support!
I want to make a statement so big it can’t be ignored -- not Pelosi, not the media, not the leftists trying to take over Pennsylvania...
In the next few days, as we close the books on 2019, we’re up against 1) and End of Month goal, 2) an End of Quarter goal, and 3) an End of Year goal... Three chances to send a message loud and clear.

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96d/3eb3e2fc/6a4e5889/744edc15/618400244/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191230_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191230_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96d/3eb3e2fc/6a4e5889/744edc14/618400244/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191230_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191230_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). | Friend, here's the truth: [We're facing a fundraising shortfall. We need you to make a $29 donation to Michael's presidential campaign, and here's why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ac/134673f2/89d1dad/699797d2/928226788/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_123019_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

The final fundraising deadline of 2019 is tomorrow at midnight. While people pop champagne and watch the ball drop, others will be scrutinizing our numbers.

Michael has been an underdog in this race, and so far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy.

But unless we raise another $75,OOO before New Years Eve, [we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ac/134673f2/89d1dad/699797d2/928226788/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_123019_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[_But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ac/134673f2/89d1dad/699797d2/928226788/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_123019_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

"" Since Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step we take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with us, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race. "" | | "" Thank you, Bennet for America | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Big Things!
body:
This is preheader text. Some clients will show this text as a preview. | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8573c89b33&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3d8b016f1e&e=ad8cba7e98) | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2243c728f7&e=ad8cba7e98)
---|---
| Big Things
---

Hello and Happy New Year!!

There’s already a buzz in the air about the coming intensity of the next twelve months. We hope you are as ready as we are - because **True the Vote is planning big things in 2020!
**
The clock is ticking down to the end of 2019, but there's still time to contribute!

As a nation, we’ve become increasingly unwilling to just assume that our elections are free and fair. Ineligible voting, illegal ballot harvesting, institutionalized subversion, cyber crimes, foreign country interference ... **now, in more ways than ever, election integrity is at risk. **

True the Vote is the only national organization focused solely on the training, research, and support needed to stop election fraud. If you want to volunteer, start a local team, work with existing election integrity state teams - we want to help you and we want to collaborate with other organizations, too! [**We're all in this together!**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a85ffe62d1&e=ad8cba7e98)

The last few months of this year were spent preparing the infrastructure to support what is coming:

* New faces in the True the Vote team
* Expanded training programs
* State-specific volunteer kits
* Focused outreach to veteran and first responder communities
* Innovative research database
* True the Vote YouTube channel and podcast

**[If you’d like to help us get a strong start 2020, please consider making a year-end donation to True the Vote.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c2e6557e26&e=ad8cba7e98) **We are a 501c3 non-profit organization, so any donation to us is tax-deductible!

| Help True the Vote
---

support free and fair elections

| [STOP VOTER FRAUD IN 2020](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=aad768762c&e=ad8cba7e98)
---

Donations made to True the Vote are tax deductible.
True the Vote is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095

Look for a follow-up email from us next week, when we’ll begin to detail the steps of a plan that will engage volunteers in nationwide effort to ensure election integrity in 2020! Between now and then, let's celebrate! Our best days are ahead!

Onward -
Catherine

Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote Founder
catherine@truethevote.org
| | PO Box 3109 #19128
Houston, TX 77253-3109
713.401.6017
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=668b5bbbca&e=ad8cba7e98) | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fe340e1126&e=ad8cba7e98)
---|---

name: Thompson HQ
subject: [URGENT]
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

Did you see this email from Mike? FEC fundraising deadlines are so important. Once our numbers are made public, the GOP will be looking to see if we're lagging behind. That's why we have to demonstrate that we have the momentum to defend the Democratic majority in the House.

[**Can we count on you to make a donation and ensure that we have a strong showing?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/okpcdU8NPlYZshGfdW39AGeQ1EtaTHapi9XdNW80Ya8=/00yDc61wob-8MUgdvGTtGm72tCuSXVFshnkteRVfdbo=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191230_2_3&amount=25&recurring=1)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--**

Peter,

We're a little more than one day out from our FINAL fundraising deadline of the year. I cannot overstate how important it is for us to have a strong showing.

body:
Hi there,
There is a lot happening in Washington and it can be easy to focus on the hearings on the hill or to get sucked in to the Democratic presidential primary.
These are both consequential things, and unseating Donald Trump is more important than ever before. But it's also important to remember that a Democratic president can only be so successful without the backing of a Democratic Senate -- and New Hampshire is critical to winning back the majority. That's why I'm emailing you today.
Tomorrow is the last day of the year -- and the last day before our FEC deadline -- and our fundraising is a bit behind.
We need to raise $5,000 before midnight and I'm relying on your help to get there.**[Team, can I count on you to donate $3 or more today to help us hit that goal? Democrat Kim Mangone is a proud United States Air Force veteran and working single mom. She is running to defeat President Trump's righthand man in the House of Representatives: Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. McCarthy spearheaded the House vote in 2017 to fully REPEAL the Affordable Care Act under Trump's direction. name: Yang2020 Data Team
subject: We just noticed we’re about to hit a big milestone, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5360%2E377263%2EjgVjpu) Yang Gang --

Every day we look at a fundraising dashboard we built. It shows the total number of contributions for the campaign, money we’ve raised this quarter, and how far we are away from our goal.

Well, we just noticed we’re about to hit a big milestone, Yang Gang.

**[If we get 4,791 more contributions by midnight tonight, we will cross ONE MILLION contributions for this campaign. That would be huge. Can you pitch in so we can hit this big number today?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20894?t=5&akid=5360%2E377263%2EjgVjpu)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20894?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5360%2E377263%2EjgVjpu)

When you think about where this campaign started... And now we’re about to hit ONE MILLION contributions. That’s amazing.

That means one million times someone believed in Andrew, wanted to invest in what we’re fighting for, then gave their hard-earned dollars to help make it a reality.

**[We have a chance to hit this number by midnight, but it’s going to take a big effort. Will you step up for the first time so we can hit one million contributions? Pitch in here.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20894?t=12&akid=5360%2E377263%2EjgVjpu)**

Let’s do this!

Yang2020 Data Team
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20894?t=13&akid=5360%2E377263%2EjgVjpu)

name: Hickenlooper 2020
subject: You need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Real quick, folks. Here are three things you need to know --
* Cory Gardner (that's our opponent) has been rated as the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election in 2020;

* The polls show John can beat him, making Colorado the best chance to flip one of the four seats Democrats need to take back the Senate;

* Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and even Chris Christie have pledged to do whatever it takes to save this seat -- from campaigning "a lot" in Colorado to launching seven-figure TV and digital ad buys.

[**As soon as 2020 hits, the GOP is sure to go all out against John. That 's why reaching our end-of-year goal tomorrow is absolutely critical to building the resources we need to combat the GOP's attacks and flip Colorado's Senate seat blue. Pitch in now:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191230-eoy?refcode=em-191230-christie-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191230-eoy?refcode=em-191230-christie-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") John's doing everything he can to win this critical Senate race, but he can't do it alone. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6d/5fca0d19/7be5f160/291cc990/4206506741/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6d/5fca0d19/7be5f160/291cc99f/4206506741/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6d/5fca0d19/7be5f160/291cc99e/4206506741/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6d/5fca0d19/7be5f160/291cc99d/4206506741/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6d/5fca0d19/7be5f160/291cc991/4206506741/VEsHAw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
clean_body: | | | | Hey friend, here's an update on our progress to qualifying for the January debate: FIRST: The DNC announced the threshold to qualify for the January debate -- each candidate must have 225,000 individual donors (which we have surpassed, thanks to supporters like you) and hit at least 5% in four qualifying polls, or 7% in two early state qualifying polls THEN: Just today, our campaign went back up on TV with a six-figure ad buy in two key Iowa media markets to help get the polls we need. NOW: We're in danger of missing our critical end-of-quarter goal of $800,000. If we're able to hit this goal, we can expand our buy and go up across the rest of Iowa and in other early states. Will you chip in today to get us closer to reaching our $800,000 goal? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Friend, meeting this goal could be the difference between qualifying for the January debate or just missing the mark. We 're giving this all we've got, but we need your help if we're going to qualify for the next debate. "=" Thanks, Cory "=" P.S. Check out the ad below, then "=" "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. body:
| We caught a huge break with this match. Right now we are **$16,446** away from our $50,000 goal.

This end-of-year deadline is about protecting our planet from the climate crisis, and electing people up and down the ballot who recognize the importance of science in legislation.

That means electing John Hickenlooper in Colorado, Mark Kelly in Arizona, Barbara Bollier in Kansas, Dr. Al Gross in Alaska, AND expanding our majority in the House.

**We also can 't forget about beating Mitch McConnell in his home state of Kentucky.**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb433b/4bd7760e/464f10e8/77ad23c6/2164339908/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_2_8&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_2_8")** to make a donation.

name: Team Kasich
subject: Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Time is running out. We have until Wednesday to hit our 2019 goal. Can Gov. Kasich count on your support? [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a3ee042287574363921a8e8eb2bece82&_e=a00vap-wiaUeSmdrc28T6W-VjzWfcykLPsN36I_GIRffhlNefIFUBDHERGSUHJzQ3izhzOpcUIatE_WzSmUDmI2U28sZkrUFIESGJyKE-YHqYkp-LrZ1PwoNy3FsH37Uoqc87wl0OrxRKodiY0mbIcPac9xvoAHx41hlrYpMmaFPUYwdKLlkNY_j5sOMTKKYDRmXad_m4rUcaXxwo_TLm4Z6tLOfAuVrYShkkFq2Kqzc7C5a5R-YmnamM9X5nNytzd6Fvj1y3VnIiE4NIaNcdA%3D%3D) | |
---

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: We're at risk of missing our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Thanks for chipping in and standing with Ed! | |
---
| **We wanted to make sure you saw Jane Fonda 's note about tomorrow's FEC deadline. We're at risk of missing our goal right now, so we need you to chip in to help us get there. Thanks for chipping in and standing with Ed!**
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7302/2674733786/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-2-full")**
Friends -

Nearly 100% of climate scientists agree that a life threatening emergency is upon us. We're facing potential catastrophe.

But these scientists have also underscored that we can do something about it. This is the last decade in human history when changing course with climate action can save unimaginable numbers of human lives and species.

We have the time, technology and the tools -- everything we need except the political will.

That's why this coming year is the critical year. What happens is going to be so important for our democracy and our planet.

We have to support the people who are the bravest and the boldest of our elected officials. Those leaders who will step up and take the action that is necessary.

At the very top of that list is Senator Ed Markey. He is a champion in our fight to address the climate crisis.

He is the co-author of the Green New Deal and has led the way on the need for climate action for decades. With his powerful leadership in the Senate, I know we can get this done, but first he needs our help to stay in the fight.

**[If you can, please make a $3 donation today to support his campaign. We need as many people as possible to step up before this month's FEC deadline, and your contribution will help us send a powerful message about our climate movement's strength.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7302/2674733786/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-2-full")**

I recently celebrated my 82nd birthday, and you know, I've lived a good life.

But I also know that I'm so fortunate to be healthy and living in a decade where we can actually make a difference. Together, we can save our planet and its people for generations to come.

I'm optimistic about that, and I know that Senator Ed Markey is too. We're more hopeful than ever thanks to the young people who are leading our movement in an intergenerational compact.

But there are others who have decided now, in the face of this climate catastrophe, that they want to challenge Senator Markey's progressive leadership.

I believe we cannot afford to lose Senator Markey's important leadership at this critical moment for our planet. He has an unparalleled record of legislative accomplishments to protect the environment, to fight the climate crisis, and to fuel the clean energy revolution. It's more important than ever to have partners we can trust with the experience and know how not just to fight but to boldly lead on this critical issue.

But like I said, I'm optimistic. I've worked with Senator Markey and seen firsthand that he knows how to win tough battles. I believe in him, and I believe that all of us working together can save this planet from the climate crisis.

**[If you believe too, then join me in supporting Senator Ed Markey by contributing $3 to his re-election campaign.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7302/2674733786/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-2-full")**

Our movement has a big year ahead of us. Lots of big fights, but this is at the top. Thank you for having Ed's back. I know it means a lot to him and to me.

In solidarity,

Jane Fonda **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7302/2674733786/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191230-2-full")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7301/2674733786/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff1/693b8b0a/43618376/72de7300/2674733786/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")

name: Team Warren
subject: Last-minute boost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The next day and a half will be some of the most important of the 2020 primary. Our fundraising is falling behind last quarter and if it doesn't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfd3/45c30650/1eafdc1db/66fd1b6c/1413702469/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Tomorrow is our final FEC deadline of 2019.

After, we'll know where we stand going into the first caucuses and primaries -- and what resources we have to invest in on-the-ground organizing.

**The next day and a half will be some of the most important of the 2020 primary. And it'll go by fast! Our fundraising is falling behind last quarter and if it doesn't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize for Elizabeth in all 50 states.**

**[Elizabeth is counting on grassroots supporters to help our campaign reach our $20 million goal. Can she count you in? Donate $2 or whatever you can before our final FEC deadline and help hit this important goal:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfd3/45c30650/1eafdc1db/66fd1b6f/1413702469/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJERl9FT1FfTENOX1RfMjAxOTEyMzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2DF_EOQ_LCN_T_20191230_V1S3_P")**

After, we'll know where we stand going into the first caucuses and primaries -- and what resources we have to invest in on-the-ground organizing. The next day and a half will be some of the most important of the 2020 primary. And it'll go by fast! Our fundraising is falling behind last quarter and if it doesn't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize for Elizabeth in all 50 states. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" In January, we will tally our numbers and release a public fundraising report. Everyone -- from cable news pundits to other campaigns to Iowa caucus goers -- will be looking at these numbers to judge our strength. And it could be one of the last headlines voters and caucus goers read before making up their mind. And how much our campaign is able to invest in Elizabeth's organizing plan depends on you. "" Thanks again for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
Friends - I have difficult news to share: **A recent poll shows Gary Peters statistically TIED with his right-wing extremist opponent, handpicked by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.**
And it gets worse: **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the ONLY way Democrats flip the Senate is by winning in Michigan.**
But with Trump and Mitch McConnell helping funnel $3 million into Michigan alongside TWO right-wing super PACs to flip this seat, defeat Gary and strengthen their grip on the Senate, **we're in REAL DANGER of missing our ONLY opportunity to take back the Senate for Democrats!**
**With Senate control on the line here in Michigan, our fundraising is falling short of the $19,428 we need to raise to win. And without you, friends, we might not make it.**

body:

How's about you toss in $10 before tomorrow's end-of-year deadline to get the job done for Democrats? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191230_em_fr_b3_carville_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Here's the deal: \-- McConnell could lose his seat -- and his whole freaking majority \-- Even _Fox News_ admits Mitch McConnell's approval is TANKING \-- But Democrats' chances are ZERO to defeat McConnell's Senate if we don't win New Mexico If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give Ben Ray our money NOW! He's got a gap to fill and 24 hours until his deadline to do it. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b785/18e32a7f/50eeedcb/7b228f00/124756414/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b785/18e32a7f/50eeedcb/7b228f01/124756414/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b785/18e32a7f/50eeedcb/7b228f06/124756414/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Is your name on the report?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're just 24 hours away from closing the books on our critical end-of-year FEC deadline. Can you help us get back on track for our goal?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-24?refcode=em191230-24&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I am about to ask you to add a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota because we're just 24 hours away from closing the books on our critical end-of-year FEC deadline.

My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise as much as we can before tomorrow's deadline expires, which means our job between now and then is to collect as many grassroots donations as it takes to submit the strongest report possible in the new year.

It's important you know that everyone, from our opponent Jason Lewis to Mitch McConnell's dark money network and the cable news pundits, will see these fundraising numbers after the FEC deadline passes.

That's why I'm asking:

**Will you add a donation of $10 or more before our final FEC deadline tomorrow? The more names we have on our report, the stronger our campaign will look, which means our race will be taken seriously.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-24?refcode=em191230-24&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

I firmly believe one of the best chances we have of taking back the Senate majority is by holding strong right here in Minnesota. But everything can change between now and Election Day, so we need to build a campaign that can overcome anything the other side throws at us. Can I count on your help?

Thanks in advance.

-- Tina
