My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise as much as we can before tomorrow's deadline expires, which means our job between now and then is to collect as many grassroots donations as it takes to submit the strongest report possible in the new year. It's important you know that everyone, from our opponent Jason Lewis to Mitch McConnell's dark money network and the cable news pundits, will see these fundraising numbers after the FEC deadline passes. That's why I'm asking: Will you add a donation of $10 or more before our final FEC deadline tomorrow? The more names we have on our report, the stronger our campaign will look, which means our race will be taken seriously. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I firmly believe one of the best chances we have of taking back the Senate majority is by holding strong right here in Minnesota. But everything can change between now and Election Day, so we need to build a campaign that can overcome anything the other side throws at us. Can I count on your help? Thanks in advance. -- Tina

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Will you help my friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My close friend and fellow veteran Senator Joni Ernst is on the ballot and she's under attack. Will you help us win the single most important senate race in 2020?
If you would prefer not to receive future emails from the NRSC, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Friend,

Will you help us win the _single_ most important senate race in 2020? My close friend and fellow veteran Senator **Joni Ernst** is on the ballot and she's under attack.

Soros, Bloomberg, and liberal dark money groups are already pouring millions of dollars into Iowa to try to beat Joni.

Why? Because they know that Joni is a rock-solid conservative. She is pro-life. She opposes amnesty and sanctuary cities. She's tough on crime, and she's fought for conservative judges.

The Left knows that if they can beat Joni Ernst, they'll be able to replace a conservative combat veteran with an open-borders socialist.

I don't intend to let that happen. And that's why I'm asking for your help. [**Will you make a contribution that will be split between my campaign and Joni 's?**](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

With your help, we can win this race, and you can send Joni and me back to fight for President Trump's agenda and oppose what the radical socialists are trying to do to our country.

In service,

Tom Cotton

**[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---
_****_

****

__If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. T&C/Privacy Policy: [55404-info.com](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) _****_
| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002

The NRSC is the sole national committee dedicated to strengthening our Republican Senate majority. We believe that emails are a vital way for us to communicate with supporters like you through breaking news alerts on issues and events critical to the future of our country and our Republican Senate majority. This committee is 100% committed to defeating all Democrat Senate candidates this cycle, but we rely on the generosity of supporters like you. 99% of the NRSC's donations come from small donations from our grassroots supporters.

This message reflects our committee's views and opinions. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of our online grassroots community. If you would like to make a contribution, [please visit our website here](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0). While it is more cost-effective for our committee and our Senate campaigns to receive donations online, we do accept donations through mail. If you would prefer to mail in your donation, you can print off our [donation form here](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) and send it to our committee.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from the NRSC, [visit here](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0). You can also view our Privacy Policy [here](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE0NDU5ODMS1&r=OTkwNjM4MzUzNjYxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcwNjIxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0). We thank you for your continued support this cycle.

name: Dru Davis
subject: Reaching out about my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
A lot of people know my mom, Wendy Davis, for her 13-hour filibuster...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend,
A lot of people know my mom, Wendy Davis, for her 13-hour filibuster to stop an anti-abortion law in Texas. But I know her as someone who's been fighting for women and families my entire life.
**That 's why, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my mom's campaign for Congress - before her final and most important FEC fundraising deadline of the year. But first, let me take a moment to explain why she's counting on your support. **
What my mom did on the floor of the Texas Senate over six years ago - that filibuster that inspired so many people - was the culmination of years of public service. In her time in the legislature and on the Fort Worth city council, she spoke up for the voiceless again and again and again.
That takes grit. And I know my sister Amber and I are incredibly lucky to have a mom - and "Bubbie" to Amber's daughters - who is so fearless in the fight for our democracy. **But that 's not who the GOP wants. The GOP wants someone who will rubber-stamp their extreme, far-right agenda - and that's why they've made my mom one of their top targets. **
**Mom 's most important FEC deadline all year is TOMORROW, but we're still $3,819 short. So I'm personally asking you: ****[Will you rush $3 or more now to elect my mom, Wendy Davis, flip Texas from red to blue and expand our House majority?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Your support means so much to us. I can't thank you enough.
Dru
[Contribute](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk15-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a93/704929dc/160c2989/399393ff/2940598968/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a93/704929dc/160c2989/399393fe/2940598968/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a93/704929dc/160c2989/399393f1/2940598968/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

name: membership@dga.net
subject: re: your membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
We were running out of options, Team.

Election year is just around the corner, and Republicans are stockpiling _millions_ to advance the Trump agenda. **And Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then we called on you to donate to our 2020 Victory Fund and commit to electing Democrats ... and donations SKYROCKETED!
Now that Donald Trump has been impeached, Democrats have the historic opportunity to hold him and his GOP allies accountable and win in key swing states across the country. But Republicans are massively outspending us, so Democrats have to act RIGHT NOW or we'll blow our chances. **Team, can we count on you to chip in to elect Democrats in 2020?**

We pulled your supporter record, and here's what we found:
**Name:** Top Supporter
**Supporter ID:** 8751682
**Membership Status:** **[PENDING>> Gifts DOUBLED when you activate your 2020 membership!](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY3NjgzMDUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTgwMTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We're still falling short of what we need to elect Democrats everywhere. With so many critical races in 2020, we cannot afford to miss this goal.

If we're going to beat Trump and his GOP allies, we HAVE to hit our critical end-of-year goal - but right now we're $27,695 short, and we're almost out of time. **A group of fired-up donors is DOUBLING every gift through midnight tomorrow, and we need you to take advantage of this HUGE opportunity!**
**Team, will you stand with the 648 Democrats who've already stepped up by giving $1 now? Every dollar you donate will be matched to help elect Democrats, defeat Republicans and STOP Trump:**
